basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) JRF(GATE) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Physics, Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation/Production/Manufacturing Engineering, CSIR UGC NET/GATE qualified
qualification.details: JRF(GATE): Post Graduate in Physics or Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation/Production/Manufacturing Engineering selected through a process described through National Eligibility Test CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Resume Online Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF(GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF(GATE) recruitment is 13-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is JRF(GATE).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the JRF(GATE) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF(GATE) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 38250 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree in Physics or a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation/Production/Manufacturing Engineering and be CSIR UGC NET/GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is through an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on the resume followed by an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link in the Important Links section of this article.
